patterns.name: TS2556_SPREAD_ARGS
patterns.description: Spread args sur fonction sans rest param

patterns.name: AS_ANY_INSTEAD_OF_JEST_MOCKED
patterns.description: as any au lieu de jest.Mocked<T> dans les tests
patterns.fix: jest.Mocked<InterfacePort> pour repos injectes, makeFakeRepo() factory pour mocks complexes, as unknown as Type pour casts explicites
patterns.fixResult: V1.1 wave-c: 64 as any -> 0 dans tests
patterns.r4Status: CONFIRME 0 as-any (PE-001 toujours actif et efficace)

patterns.name: HEXA_IMPORT_VIOLATION
patterns.description: Import concret adapter dans useCase/application layer
patterns.fix: Creer interface port dans domain/ports/, adapter implements le port, composition root seul autorise les imports concrets
patterns.fixResult: R6-fixes: SocialTokenVerifier port interface extracted, SocialLoginUseCase injects via constructor
patterns.r4Status: FERME — Regression M4 corrigee en R6-fixes (d9c17a2). Verification R8: port interface presente.
patterns.regressionDetail: socialLogin.useCase imports concrete adapter instead of port interface — CORRIGE

patterns.name: GREP_PATH_RELATIVE
patterns.description: grep avec path relatif retourne 0 au lieu du count reel
patterns.fix: Toujours utiliser cd /repo/root && grep -r ou chemin absolu. Le hook rtk peut interferer.

patterns.name: CONSOLE_NOT_DEV_GUARDED
patterns.fix: Supprimer ou wrapper dans if (__DEV__). Les erreurs non-critiques (logout, token clear) peuvent etre silencieuses.

patterns.name: NSPRIVACY_EMPTY
patterns.fix: Renseigner avec les types reels de donnees collectees. Expo utilise NSPrivacyCollectedDataType (pas ...Identifier).

patterns.name: DEVDEPS_IN_DOCKER_PROD
patterns.severityEscalationReason: 3 consecutive runs unfixed — escalated from 3 to 4
patterns.fix: pnpm install --prod dans le runtime stage ou prune apres COPY
patterns.fixResult: R5-hotfix (09c6b3e): Docker 3-stage build — build stage, deps-prod stage (pnpm install --prod), runtime stage. devDeps excluded from final image.
patterns.r4Status: FERME — C7 corrige en R5-hotfix. Docker 3-stage: build -> deps-prod -> runtime.

patterns.name: DOC_REWRITE_REGRESSION
patterns.description: Reecriture totale d'un fichier doc introduit des regressions de contenu
patterns.fix: Toujours verifier via git diff que le contenu original est preserve apres reecriture. Preferer edition chirurgicale a reecriture totale.
patterns.fixResult: Codifie en regle IL-1 et IL-5

patterns.name: FRONTEND_NO_ERROR_BOUNDARY
patterns.description: Aucun React Error Boundary dans l'app React Native — crash JS = crash app entiere (ecran blanc)
patterns.fix: Ajouter un ErrorBoundary React au root layout (_layout.tsx) avec fallback UI gracieux. Considerer react-native-error-boundary ou implementation custom.
patterns.fixResult: R5-hotfix (09c6b3e): Custom ErrorBoundary class component with Sentry.captureException, componentDidCatch, reload via expo-updates. Placed before all providers in _layout.tsx. Sentry.wrap on root export.
patterns.r4Status: FERME — C1 corrige en R5-hotfix. Verifie R8 (6 criteres PASS).

patterns.name: EXTERNAL_FETCH_NO_TIMEOUT
patterns.description: fetch() vers services externes (audio transcription, TTS) sans timeout ni AbortController
patterns.fix: Ajouter AbortController avec timeout (30s) sur tous les fetch() externes. Pattern: const controller = new AbortController(); setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);
patterns.fixResult: R6-fixes (d9c17a2): AbortSignal.timeout() added to both audio transcription fetch and TTS fetch calls.

patterns.name: OPENAPI_SPEC_DRIFT
patterns.description: 20 routes (admin, museum, support) absentes de l'OpenAPI spec — drift silencieux, pas de types generes
patterns.fix: Ajouter les 20 routes manquantes a l'OpenAPI spec. Mettre en place un test CI qui verifie que toutes les routes Express enregistrees ont une definition OpenAPI correspondante.
patterns.fixResult: R6-fixes (39aaada): 20 routes + 14 schemas added to OpenAPI spec. Total: 42 paths, 47 operations. Frontend types regenerated.
patterns.r4Status: FERME — C4 corrige en R6-fixes. 42 paths, 47 operations. Verifie R8.

patterns.name: ZERO_SECURITY_SCANNING_CI
patterns.description: Aucun security scanning dans CI (pas de Trivy, CodeQL, Dependabot). Vulnerabilites deps non detectees automatiquement.
patterns.fix: Activer Dependabot pour les deps (package.json). Ajouter Trivy scan sur l'image Docker dans le deploy workflow. Optionnel: CodeQL pour SAST.
patterns.fixResult: R5-hotfix (09c6b3e): Dependabot config added (.github/dependabot.yml), npm audit made blocking in CI, Trivy image scan gate added before GHCR push in deploy workflows.
patterns.r4Status: FERME — C9 corrige en R5-hotfix. Dependabot + Trivy + audit blocking.

patterns.name: FLASHLIST_V2_NO_ESTIMATED_ITEM_SIZE
patterns.description: FlashList v2.3.1 removed estimatedItemSize prop (auto-measurement). Design assumed v1 API.
patterns.fix: Check FlashList version before specifying estimatedItemSize. v2.x = auto-measurement, no prop needed. contentContainerStyle only supports padding + backgroundColor. Use ItemSeparatorComponent for gaps.
patterns.fixResult: Removed estimatedItemSize from all 3 FlashList instances during dev self-verification (tsc caught it).

patterns.name: AGENT_SCOPE_CREEP
patterns.description: Agent committed unauthorized work outside mandate scope including fake FINALIZE, KB entries, and sprint tracking
patterns.fix: Add explicit scope boundaries in agent mandates. Agents MUST NOT: commit code, write KB files, update sprint tracking, or perform FINALIZE. These are Tech Lead/Sentinelle responsibilities.
patterns.fixResult: R12-chore: LIMITES OPERATIONNELLES section added to all 9 agent definitions + SKILL.md mandate template + REGLES ABSOLUES rule 7

patterns.name: ASYNC_MIGRATION_INCOMPLETE
patterns.description: Function made async but not all callers updated to await — sync callers get Promise<T> instead of T
patterns.fix: After making any function async: 1) grep all callers, 2) update each to await, 3) update tests (async callbacks + await). Systematic, not optional.
patterns.fixResult: R13: evaluateUserInputGuardrail made async, 2 callers + 30 tests updated

patterns.name: USEEFFECT_ZUSTAND_SELECTOR_LOOP
patterns.description: Zustand array/object selectors in useEffect deps cause infinite re-renders (new ref every render)
patterns.fix: Use store.getState() inside the effect callback with empty deps [], or use useRef for mutable state. Never put pendingKeywords/lastSyncAt selectors in deps.
patterns.fixResult: R13: useKeywordsSync rewritten with getState() pattern and empty deps

patterns.name: BULK_DB_N_PLUS_1
patterns.description: Bulk operations implemented as sequential individual queries instead of single INSERT ON CONFLICT
patterns.fix: For bulk upserts, use INSERT INTO table VALUES (...) ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE. Deduplicate inputs with Set before query.
patterns.fixResult: R13: bulkUpsert rewritten — 1 query instead of 200 for 100 keywords

summary.note: EP-004 (GREP_PATH_RELATIVE) severity 2, low impact. EP-014 (AGENT_SCOPE_CREEP) FIXED R12-chore — LIMITES OPERATIONNELLES in 9 agents + SKILL.md.
